ddls:
CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data entry */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the market data */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the currency */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the currency */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the currency */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the currency */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the currency */,
  "volume_usd" REAL /* Trading volume in USD */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency symbol (e.g., INR, USD, EUR) */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the market data entry */,
  "high_time" TEXT /* Time when the highest price was reached */,
  "low_time" TEXT /* Time when the lowest price was reached */,
  "ml_prediction" REAL /* Machine learning prediction for future price movements */,
  "trend_direction" TEXT /* Current trend direction (e.g., up, down, sideways) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "currencies" (
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each currency */,
  "currency_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the currency (e.g., INR, USD, EUR) */,
  "currency_name" TEXT /* Name of the currency (e.g., Indian Rupee, United States Dollar, Euro) */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin for the currency */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO 4217 code for the currency */,
  "central_bank" TEXT /* Name of the central bank responsible for the currency */,
  "exchange_rate_source" TEXT /* Primary source for exchange rate data (e.g., official exchange rate, market rate) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "currency_pairs" (
  "pair_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each currency pair */,
  "base_currency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the base currency */,
  "quote_currency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the quote currency */,
  "pair_name" TEXT /* Name of the currency pair (e.g., INR/USD) */,
  "spread" REAL /* Average spread for the currency pair */,
  "liquidity" TEXT /* Liquidity level of the currency pair */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the currency pair information was updated */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pair_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchange_rates" (
  "rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange rate */,
  "pair_id" INTEGER /* ID of the currency pair */,
  "rate_date" TEXT /* Date of the exchange rate */,
  "rate" REAL /* Exchange rate value */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the exchange rate entry */,
  "bid_price" REAL /* Bid price of the currency pair */,
  "ask_price" REAL /* Ask price of the currency pair */,
  "mid_price" REAL /* Mid-price of the currency pair */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume for the exchange rate */,
  "ml_prediction" REAL /* Machine learning prediction for future exchange rate movements */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exchange_rates_pair_id FOREIGN KEY ("pair_id") REFERENCES currency_pairs ("pair_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market indicator */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the market indicator */,
  "indicator_description" TEXT /* Description of the market indicator */,
  "formula" TEXT /* Formula used to calculate the market indicator */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the indicator information was updated */,
  "ml_prediction" REAL /* Machine learning prediction for future indicator values */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "indicator_values" (
  "value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each indicator value */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market indicator */,
  "pair_id" INTEGER /* ID of the currency pair */,
  "value_date" TEXT /* Date of the indicator value */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the market indicator */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the indicator value entry */,
  "ml_prediction" REAL /* Machine learning prediction for future indicator values */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_indicator_values_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES market_indicators ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_indicator_values_pair_id FOREIGN KEY ("pair_id") REFERENCES currency_pairs ("pair_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, trader, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last time the user logged in */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission (e.g., view_market_data, trade_currency) */,
  "permission_description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date of the notification */,
  "notification_message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., market update, exchange rate change, system alert) */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the notification has been read by the user */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the notification (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
